ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tv_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "series_title" TEXT /* Title of the television series */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the series started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year the series ended */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the series (e.g., drama, comedy, horror) */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Creator of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Notable awards won by the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the actor playing the character */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the character (e.g., alive, dead, recurring) */,
  "first_appearance" TEXT /* First appearance of the character in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_actor_id FOREIGN KEY ("actor_id") REFERENCES actors ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the series the episode belongs to */,
  "season_number" INTEGER /* Season number of the episode */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the season */,
  "episode_title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date the episode aired */,
  "directed_by" TEXT /* Director of the episode */,
  "written_by" TEXT /* Writer of the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES tv_series ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_cast" (
  "episode_cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode cast entry */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character appearing in the episode */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or trivia about the appearance */,
  "billing_order" INTEGER /* Billing order of the actor in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_cast_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_cast_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, researcher, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the episode */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the episode was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "device_used" TEXT /* Device used to access the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_characters" (
  "episode_character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode-character association */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the character */,
  "appearance_order" INTEGER /* Order of appearance in the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_characters_character_id FOREIGN KEY ("character_id") REFERENCES characters ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_characters_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episode_reviews_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episode_ratings" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the episode */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the episode (e.g., 4.2/5) */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings for the episode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id")
)
